message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The last visible output shows cleanup produced 176 final lines, but the displayed tail still contains partial/artifact lines like "open I", "get", "put al", "get egg,sow", "give eg", "Wind ac", and "wind c". This means /app/solution.txt is not yet a clean list of completed moves. A backup /app/solution.txt.bak exists. The next concrete action is to run a stricter cleanup that rejects verb-only fragments and too-short second tokens, then inspect the actual file before finalizing.",
  "plan": "Run Panel 1's stricter clean_v2.py against /app/solution.txt.bak, writing cleaned moves to /app/solution.txt. Then inspect the result with wc/head/tail to verify whether it is clean enough to finalize or whether a Moves-counter re-extraction is needed.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /tmp/clean_v2.py <<'PY'
import re
INP='/app/solution.txt.bak'
OUT='/app/solution.txt'
with open(INP) as f:
    raw=[line.rstrip('\n') for line in f if line.strip()]

phrases=[
    'done.','taken.','you are','you hear','you see','there is','there are',
    'on the ground','suspicious-looking','suspicious','stiletto','scream','butt',
    'this is','it is','can be seen','strange passage','cyclops room',
    'slide room','mine entrance','squeaky room','white cliffs beach',
    'damp cave','loud room','treasure room','jewel-encrusted','jewel',
    'platinum bar','platinum','silver chalice','thief','deflates.',
    'your own feet','heavy iron chain','heavy iron','chain','three sides',
    'at the end','room score','moves:','moves','revision','serial number',
    'copyright','zork i:','zork','infocom','all rights reserved',
    'west of house','staircase to the','staircase','reservoir',
    'southeast.','southeast','cin>','cind','cin','wind can',
    'wind canar','wind canary','more','1s a suspicious'
]
verbs={
    'get','take','drop','put','open','close','light','kill','slay','move','push','pull',
    'set','raise','lower','wave','dig','shove','give','wind','pray','save','look',
    'inventory','read','rub','climb','pour','fill','blow','throw','attack','drink',
    'eat','count','wait','board','disembark','launch','land','unwrap','tie','untie',
    'turn','press','type','enter','go','examine','lock','unlock','inflate','deflate',
    'pump','squeeze','touch','kick','jump','swim','cross','leave','follow','shoot',
    'solve','ring'
}
multi_ok={'look','inventory','wait','go','enter','examine','count','attack','save'}

dirs={'n','s','e','w','u','d','ne','nw','se','sw'}

def clean_cmd(s):
    s=s.encode('ascii',errors='ignore').decode()
    s=s.replace('>>','>').replace('_','').replace('|','')
    s=re.sub(r'^[>\s]+','',s).strip()
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    s=re.sub(r'[\\|_]+$','',s).strip()
    s=s.rstrip('.').strip()
    return s

raw=[clean_cmd(l) for l in raw]
raw=[c for c in raw if c]

coll=[]
for c in raw:
    if not coll:
        coll.append(c); continue
    prev=coll[-1].lower()
    cur=c.lower()
    if cur.startswith(prev) and len(c) >= len(coll[-1]):
        coll[-1]=c
    elif prev.startswith(cur):
        pass
    else:
        coll.append(c)

final=[]
for c in coll:
    low=c.lower()
    if not low or any(p in low for p in phrases):
        continue
    if len(low) > 60 or re.search(r'\d{4,}', low):
        continue
    if low in dirs:
        final.append(low); continue
    parts=low.split()
    if not parts or parts[0] not in verbs:
        continue
    if len(parts) == 1 and parts[0] not in multi_ok:
        continue
    if len(parts) == 2 and len(parts[1]) < 2 and parts[0] not in multi_ok:
        continue
    if not re.fullmatch(r'[a-z0-9 ,.\-]{1,60}', low):
        continue
    if final and final[-1].lower() == low:
        continue
    final.append(c)

with open(OUT,'w') as f:
    for m in final:
        f.write(m+'\n')

print('raw',len(raw),'collapsed',len(coll),'final',len(final))
for i,m in enumerate(final,1):
    print(i,m)
PY
python3 /tmp/clean_v2.py
",
      "duration": 5.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '--- final solution ---'; wc -l /app/solution.txt; head -80 /app/solution.txt; echo '--- tail ---'; tail -40 /app/solution.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
